---
title: "Cours"
subtitle: "Supports de cours, semaine par semaine"
toc: false
---

::: {.casc-info-banner}
<i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>

Les supports de cours sont disponibles en **français** et en **anglais**. Cliquez sur la version souhaitée pour ouvrir les transparents dans un nouvel onglet.
:::

::: {.casc-table-wrapper}

```{=html}
<table class="casc-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width: 8rem;">Semaine</th>
      <th>Sujet</th>
      <th style="width: 9rem;">Français</th>
      <th style="width: 9rem;">English</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 1</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Introduction au langage Julia</td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn fr" href="cours/julia_fr.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> FR</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn en" href="cours/julia_en.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> EN</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 2</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Interpolation</td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn fr" href="cours/interpolation_fr.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> FR</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn en" href="cours/interpolation_en.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> EN</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 2</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Intégration numérique</td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn fr" href="cours/integration_fr.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> FR</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn en" href="cours/integration_en.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> EN</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="casc-week-badge">Sem. 3</span></td>
      <td class="casc-topic">Systèmes linéaires</td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn fr" href="cours/linear_fr.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> FR</a></td>
      <td><a class="casc-lang-btn en" href="cours/linear_en.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> EN</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
